title: 樫本代理の秘密の一面

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I'm out looking for some protein-rich
snacks for our team training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as I'm about to fall into the pits of despair, a
sharp voice cuts through my thoughts.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: What are you doing? You're in everyone's way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I hesitantly explain the situation to her.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
So in short, you're looking for cheap,
easy-to-find, and protein-rich snacks that come
in small portions...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I believe kinako sticks would be a good choice,
then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since kinako is simply roasted soy powder, it's
rich in protein, and the sticks are a perfect size
for grab-and-go snacks.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
It's a bit of a walk, but there's a small store three
blocks down and to the right that carries them.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
They sell economy-sized bags with individually
packaged servings, and they're priced very fairly.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Just be aware that kinako tends to dry out the
mouth, so make sure to prepare enough drinks for
your racers as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I stand in awe at how quickly Ms. Kashimoto was
able to find a solution to my problem.
choice_data_list:
Wow, it's amazing how quickly you came up
with that.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
It's a habit of mine. I can't help but remember any
stores and locations I come across that stock
them.
choice_data_list: Are you a fan of kinako sticks?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A trace of darkness passes over Ms. Kashimoto's
usually cool expression at my question.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: An Umamusume I used to train loved them.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Excuse me. I must be going.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She leaves before I can stop her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her parting expression is so pained that I can't
help but remember it long after she's gone...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The good news is that the kinako sticks she
recommended are a hit with the team, and I have
a new snack to add to their diets.
